creator: linimon@lonesome.com
text:
----- Forwarded message from Takefu <takefu@airport.fm> -----

Date: Thu, 17 Feb 2011 17:01:43 +0900
From: Takefu <takefu@airport.fm>
To: flo@FreeBSD.org
Cc: freebsd-ports-bugs@freebsd.org
Subject: Re: ports/134263: munin-node failure in some
User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows; U; Windows NT 6.0; ja;
	rv:1.9.2.13) Gecko/20101207 Thunderbird/3.1.7

I think all patches to be unnecessary because it is old now.
Please close if you think it is unnecessary.

--- patch-bind9.in
It has solved it.
see http://munin-monitoring.org/changeset/3024

--- patch-hddtemp_smartctl.in
It has solved it with pango-1.28.3.

--- patch-postfix_mailstats.in
Do you solve it by introducing security/logcheck?

--- sysutils/munin-node/files/plugins.conf
It is unnecessary, and forget, please. :-)

----- End forwarded message -----
